# Deaths in War

> Interactive 3D globe tracking ongoing armed conflicts worldwide and their human cost.

## About

This site visualizes all ongoing armed conflicts globally on an interactive 3D globe.
Data is scraped daily from Wikipedia's List of Ongoing Armed Conflicts, enriched with
UCDP (Uppsala Conflict Data Program) geolocation data. Each conflict marker is sized
by cumulative death toll and colored by intensity level.

## Key Features

- Daily updated death toll data for all ongoing armed conflicts
- Interactive 3D globe with conflict markers
- Conflict intensity classification: Major War, War, Minor Conflict, Skirmish
- Detailed conflict information including location, countries involved, start year

## API

- [Conflicts Data](https://deaths-in-war.vercel.app/api/conflicts): JSON array of all ongoing armed conflicts with death tolls, coordinates, intensity, and affected regions
- [Statistics](https://deaths-in-war.vercel.app/api/stats): Aggregated statistics including total deaths, conflict counts by intensity
- [Last Updated](https://deaths-in-war.vercel.app/api/last-updated): Timestamp of most recent data scrape

## Full Data

For complete conflict data in text format, see: https://deaths-in-war.vercel.app/llms-full.txt

## Data Sources

- Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ongoing_armed_conflicts
- UCDP GED: https://ucdp.uu.se/downloads/
